title: Pebble Generation
description: This mod add the option to get an item by shift right-clicking on a block.
body:
![Logo](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/zV1MFZID/images/cbd4e836071dc0753cc95c900629171de6416ddd.png)

In this mod you can generate pebble by shift + right clicking on a block, grass_block by default, you can change it in mod data. You can also change what item this mod generate by shift right-clicking, by default air.

This mod is inspired by the mod [Botania Garden Of Glass](https://www.curseforge.com/minecraft/mc-mods/botania-garden-of-glass)

You can use this mod in your modpack.
